ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's head coach */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style (e.g., defensive-minded, offense-focused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_attempted" INTEGER /* Total shots attempted by the player */,
  "long_two_attempted" INTEGER /* Total long two-point shots attempted */,
  "long_two_percent" REAL /* Percentage of long two-point shots made */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans in attendance */,
  "broadcast_network" TEXT /* Network that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "total_attempted" INTEGER /* Total shots attempted by the team */,
  "long_two_attempted" INTEGER /* Total long two-point shots attempted by the team */,
  "long_two_percent" REAL /* Percentage of long two-point shots made by the team */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the team */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., arena name) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for playoff game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the playoff game */,
  "series_score" TEXT /* Series score (e.g., 4-3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_losing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Coach, Analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (referencing user_roles) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain, knee injury) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games the player missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., random forest, neural network) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
